data.title: onboarding SKILL.md: optional dep install commands missing process-level timeout (SC2 gap)
data.description: SC2 requires: install commands include a timeout to prevent hanging in restricted network environments. SKILL.md Step 0 lines 118-127 and Semgrep install section lines 1251-1254 use bare pip3/brew install without timeout wrapper. Fix: wrap optional dep install invocations in 'timeout N <cmd>' in both sections.
